channel.name: CalcDocs
extension.description: Excel for firmware — instantly evaluate C/C++ macros, constants, and YAML formulas with real computed values inside VS Code
config.title: CalcDocs
config.enabled: Enable or disable CalcDocs without uninstalling the extension.
config.scanInterval: Interval in seconds for periodic scanning (0 = disabled).
config.enableCppProviders: Enable CalcDocs providers for C/C++ as fallback (priority to C/C++ Tools).
config.useClangd: Enable optional clangd backend (LSP) for C/C++ symbol resolution.
config.resourceStatusMode.aboveCpuThresh: Show runtime status only when CPU usage exceeds threshold.
config.resourceStatusMode: Controls when to show runtime status in status bar.
config.resourceCpuThreshold: CPU threshold (%) used when calcdocs.resourceStatusMode = aboveCpuThreshold.
config.cppCacheMaxEntries: Maximum number of C/C++ files cached for symbol analysis.
config.ui.invasiveness: Controls how much diagnostic information is shown.
config.cpp.codeLens.showCastOverflow: Show cast overflow warnings in CodeLens.
config.cpp.codeLens.showMismatch: Show type mismatch warnings in CodeLens.
config.cpp.codeLens.showOpenFormula: Show unresolved formula links in CodeLens.
config.cpp.codeLens.showResolvedValue: Show resolved numeric values in CodeLens.
config.cpp.codeLens.showExpandedPreview: Show expanded formula preview in CodeLens.
config.cpp.hover.maxConditionalDefinitio: Maximum conditional (#ifdef) definitions shown in hover.
config.cpp.hover.maxInDocumentDefinition: Maximum in-document definitions shown in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showCastOverflow: Show cast overflow warnings in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showInheritedAmbiguity: Show inherited ambiguity warnings in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showFormulaSection: Show formula resolution section in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showKnownValue: Show known resolved values in hover.
config.inline.codeLens.maxItemsPerFile: Maximum inline CodeLens items per file.
config.inline.hover.showDimension: Show dimension analysis in inline hover.
config.inline.ghost.enabled: Enable ghost text for resolved values.
command.forceRefresh.title: CalcDocs: Force Formula Refresh
command.setScanInterval.title: CalcDocs: Set Scan Interval
command.toggleEnabled.title: CalcDocs: Toggle Enable/Disable
command.toggleGhostValues.title: CalcDocs: Toggle Ghost Values
command.restart.title: CalcDocs: Restart (Clear Cache + Reanalyze)
command.runtimeMenu.title: CalcDocs: Runtime Quick Menu
command.setUiInvasiveness.title: CalcDocs: Set UI Invasiveness
command.showOutput.title: CalcDocs: Show Log Output
command.openTestFolder.title: CalcDocs: Open Test Folder
command.inlineCalc.openGuide.title: Inline Calc Guide
command.generateFormulaHeader.title: Generate Formulas Header
view.inlineCalcResults.name: CalcDocs Inline Results
config.formulaHeader.outputPath: Path for generated C header with formula macros
config.formulaHeader.includeResolvedValu: Add resolved numeric value as comment next to each generated #define.
